reasoning_model_1: The model failed significantly in Content Accuracy. Instead of reading the provided script verbatim, it paraphrased the content into a colloquial style (e.g., changing '请大家仔细阅读' to '你们抽空仔细看看', and rewriting the entire second sentence to '争取把项目推进的更顺当...'). Regarding the target feature '年龄' (Middle-aged), the generated voice is that of a young adult female (likely in her 20s) with a bright, energetic, and high-pitched tone. It completely lacks the vocal maturity, weight, or steady tempo associated with a middle-aged persona. The expression contradicts the target age attribute.
reasoning_model_2: The model achieved perfect Content Accuracy, reading the script exactly as requested with no errors. Regarding the target feature '年龄' (Middle-aged), the audio features a male voice with a deep, resonant timbre and a measured, steady pace. The vocal texture suggests maturity, authority, and calmness, fitting the profile of a middle-aged professional manager perfectly (approx. 40-50 years old). The prosody is natural and effectively conveys the requested age characteristic without caricature.
model_comparison: Model 2 is the clear winner. Model 1 failed on two major counts: strict text adherence (it hallucinated/paraphrased the script) and the paralinguistic feature (it generated a young voice instead of a middle-aged one). Model 2 followed the text instructions perfectly and generated a voice that authentically represents the 'middle-aged' characteristic through appropriate timbre, pitch, and speaking rate. Model 1 receives a 0 due to the text deviation and incorrect age representation.
